nasb.text: So is the one who goes in to his neighbor’s wife; Whoever touches her will not go unpunished.

esv.text: So is he who goes in to his neighbor’s wife; none who touches her will go unpunished.

cnv.text: 凡是和別人的妻子通姦的，也是這樣； 凡是親近她的，都必不免受罰。

ccb.text: 与别人妻子通奸也是这样， 凡靠近她的必难逃罪责。

csbs.text: 那与邻人妻子同房的，也是如此； 所有碰她的，都难逃罪责。
